title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills
description: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Learners cumulatively produce a distributable skill plugin through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
